# Registered Valopers

Register with [the proposal realm](/r/gnops/valopers/proposal), [the Register call](gnoland/tx/call?pkgpath=gno.land/r/gnops/valopers&func=Register), and [your public profile](/r/demo/profile:g1qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq). See the [operator guide](https://docs.gno.land/validators).

 * [alpha-node](/r/gnops/valopers:g1qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq) - [profile](/r/demo/profile:g1qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq)
